description_long: This is a stylized, vintage biplane with a bright orange fuselage and two sets of dark brown, straight wings stacked vertically. The wings are supported by silver struts and have cream-colored tips and undersides, giving the aircraft a classic early-20th-century appearance. The nose features a large, wooden two-blade propeller and a visible engine cowling, while the cockpit is open and situated just behind the upper wing, with a small windshield. The tail section includes a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, all in a matching cream color. The landing gear consists of two fixed wheels mounted on struts beneath the fuselage, and a small tail skid at the rear. The overall design suggests a lightweight, maneuverable airplane suitable for short flights or display in an urban park or museum setting.
description: A vintage orange biplane with stacked brown wings, open cockpit, wooden propeller, and fixed landing gear. The design features cream accents and classic early aviation styling.
description_view_0: Side view showing the orange fuselage, stacked brown wings, silver struts, and cream tail surfaces, with the propeller and landing gear visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the tail assembly, cream-colored stabilizers, and the alignment of the double wings and landing gear.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the engine cowling, propeller, and the layered wing structure with visible struts and cream accents.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the wooden propeller, open cockpit, engine cowling, and the symmetrical arrangement of the biplane's wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two sets of straight, staggered wings supported by vertical struts; no winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a two-blade wooden propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a rear tail skid.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open single-seat cockpit located just behind the upper wing with a small windshield.
